mission.title: kubestellar: 📖 added edge-scheduler to quickstart
mission.description:
Signed-off-by: nitinmewar [nitinmewar28@gmail.com](mailto:nitinmewar28@gmail.com)
## Summary
linked edge schedular docs to Quickstart and added table of content.

## Related issue(s)

resolution.summary: @MikeSpreitzer yes, your right.  What is the right way to proceed?  Do we need a quickstart in root?  Or can we use just the one in the docs?  I would prefer the docs version.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
